---
title: "Yihao Tan"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Curriculum Vitae
      href: cv.pdf
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:yihaotan@buffalo.edu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/YihaoTancn
---

## Bio

I am is a Ph.D. candidate in Biostatistics at the State University of New York at Buffalo, with an expected graduation in December 2026. My research focuses on Bayesian Analysis, Empirical Bayes, Non-parametric Statistics, Clustering, Pharmacovigilance. 

## Curriculum Vitae

A comprehensive record of my academic and professional experience is available for download.

[View full CV (last update: May 10, 2026)](cv.pdf)
